Appearances:
Plaintiff Kahtan Alansi is present.
Attorney Aaron Farmer for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jose Reyes is present.
Defendant Wendy Escobar is present.
Attorney Megan Yip appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Oct. 21, 2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
